MODULE: cosmos.integration.cli_bridge.__init__
FILE: cosmos/integration/cli_bridge/__init__.py (49 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: CLI Bridge — Turn free AI CLIs into a unified swarm API.

"Any CLI that speaks, the swarm can hear." - The Collective

This package provides:
- CLIBridge ABC for wrapping CLI tools as async providers
- ClaudeCodeBridge for Claude Code CLI (Max subscription)
- GeminiCLIBridge for Gemini CLI (1,000 fr

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def create_router() -> CLICapabilityRouter
